arts.ttl: Arsenal star is keen on leaving with Real Madrid named as his ‘dream’ club
arts.sum: One of Arsenal’s best players is attracting interest from Real Madrid with the player open to a move to the La Liga champions. The Gunners have challenged for the Premier League title for the last two seasons but on both occasions, they have lost out to Pep Guardiola’s Manchester City side. arts.sum: Manchester City "can win" against Real Madrid in the Champions League playoffs as long as they "cut the mistakes out", club legend Shaun Wright-Phillips tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold latest: Could Conor Bradley replace Liverpool right-back if Real Madrid sign defender on free transfer?
arts.sum: Conor Bradley should come into consideration as a replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold should the right-back leave the club in the summer amidst Real Madrid's interest.

arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti maintains his side were right to boycott last year's Ballon d'Or after Vinicius Jr was beaten to the award by Manchester City's Rodri.
